label: HTTP Request
description: Make an HTTP/HTTPS request to any external API. Supports GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH, custom headers, JSON or string bodies, templating, and per-request timeout.

validation.errorMessage: URL must start with http:// or https://

settings.name: body
settings.label: Body
settings.description: Request body — JSON object or templated string. Ignored for GET/HEAD.

settings.name: acceptAllStatuses
settings.label: Accept non-2xx as success
settings.description: When true, the node returns 4xx/5xx responses as data instead of throwing — useful for APIs that use status codes intentionally.

ai.shortDescription: HTTP/HTTPS request to an external API.
ai.whenToUse: When you need to call a REST API and use the response in subsequent nodes.
ai.examplePrompt: fetch user data from the customer API: GET https://api.example.com/users/{{trigger.userId}}
ai.promptHints: Use {{steps.<id>.result.data.field}} to reference response in later nodes. Set acceptAllStatuses=true if the API uses 4xx codes intentionally.

outputAssertions.name: status_2xx
outputAssertions.errorMessage: HTTP request returned non-2xx/3xx status — set acceptAllStatuses=true to allow this.
